settings.html:
<!--
  TiffinGrab — "Who It's Perfect For" tabbed audience section (Elementor HTML widget).
  Home stack band 3 of 4: peach strip #fdeae2 (alternates with #fff8f6). Brand green: Global Colors → "WhatsApp Green".
-->
<!-- Fonts loaded once in home-2026-hero-tags.html (template 9825). -->
<section class="tg-aud" id="tg-perfect-for" aria-labelledby="tg-aud-title">
  <style>
    .elementor-widget-html:has(#tg-perfect-for),
    .elementor-widget-html:has(#tg-perfect-for) .elementor-widget-container,
    .elementor-widget-html-custom:has(#tg-perfect-for),
    .elementor-widget-html-custom:has(#tg-perfect-for) .elementor-widget-container,
    .elementor-widget-wrap:has(#tg-perfect-for),
    .elementor-column:has(#tg-perfect-for),
    .elementor-column-wrap:has(#tg-perfect-for),
    .elementor-section:has(#tg-perfect-for),
    .e-con:has(#tg-perfect-for),
    .e-con-inner:has(#tg-perfect-for) {
      overflow: visible !important;
      background-color: #fdeae2 !important;
      background-image: none !important;
    }
    .elementor-widget-html:has(#tg-perfect-for),
    .elementor-widget-html:has(#tg-perfect-for) .elementor-widget-container {
      max-width: none !important;
    }
    .tg-aud {
      --tg-brand-green: var(--e-global-color-whatsapp, #25d366);
      --aud-on: #231a15;
      --aud-muted: #564339;
      --aud-bg: #fdeae2;
      --aud-orange: #f06b1a;
      --aud-green-pill: var(--tg-brand-green);
      --aud-green-pill-ink: #ffffff;
      --aud-white: #ffffff;
      --aud-shadow: 0 28px 56px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.07);
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      color: var(--aud-on);
      background: var(--aud-bg);
      width: 100vw;
      max-width: none;
      margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
      margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
      padding: clamp(3.5rem, 7vw, 6rem) clamp(1.25rem, 4vw, 2rem);
      box-sizing: border-box;
      overflow: visible;
      overflow-x: clip;
    }
    @supports (width: 100dvw) {
      .tg-aud {
        width: 100dvw;
        margin-left: calc(50% - 50dvw);
        margin-right: calc(50% - 50dvw);
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 767px) {
      /* hidden lets the tab strip scroll; clip was clipping the horizontal scrollport on some WebKit builds */
      .tg-aud {
        overflow-x: hidden;
      }
    }
    .tg-aud * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }
    .tg-aud .material-symbols-outlined {
      font-variation-settings: "FILL" 0, "wght" 500, "GRAD" 0, "opsz" 24;
    }
    .tg-aud-inner {
      max-width: 1180px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      min-width: 0;
    }
    .tg-aud-head {
      text-align: center;
      margin-bottom: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
    }
    .tg-aud-badge {
      display: inline-block;
      padding: 0.35rem 1rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--aud-orange);
      background: rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.07);
      outline: 1px solid rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.28);
      margin-bottom: 1.1rem;
    }
    .tg-aud h2#tg-aud-title {
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
      line-height: 1.12;
      font-size: clamp(1.85rem, 4vw, 3rem);
      margin: 0;
      color: var(--aud-on);
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs-wrap {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: clamp(2.25rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs {
      display: inline-flex;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 0.35rem;
      padding: 0.4rem;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
      border-radius: 999px;
      box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.06);
      outline: 1px solid rgba(220, 193, 181, 0.18);
      max-width: 100%;
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs button {
      appearance: none;
      -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
      border: 0;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 0.8rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      padding: 0.65rem 1.15rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background-color: transparent;
      color: var(--aud-muted);
      outline: none;
      user-select: none;
      transition: transform 0.22s ease, box-shadow 0.22s ease, background-color 0.22s ease, color 0.22s ease;
      will-change: transform;
      box-shadow: none;
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs button:focus {
      outline: none;
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs button:focus-visible {
      outline: 2px solid rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.55);
      outline-offset: 3px;
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs button[aria-selected="true"]:focus-visible {
      outline-color: rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.85);
      outline-offset: 3px;
    }
    @media (min-width: 640px) {
      .tg-aud-tabs button {
        padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
        font-size: 0.82rem;
      }
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs button:not([aria-selected="true"]):hover {
      color: var(--aud-orange);
      background-color: rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.08);
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs button:not([aria-selected="true"]):active {
      transform: scale(0.98);
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs button[aria-selected="true"] {
      background-color: var(--aud-orange);
      color: #fff;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.12);
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs button[aria-selected="true"]:hover {
      background-color: #e85f0f;
      transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02);
      box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.34);
    }
    .tg-aud-tabs button[aria-selected="true"]:active {
      transform: translateY(0) scale(0.99);
    }
    @media (max-width: 767px) {
      .tg-aud-tabs button[aria-selected="true"]:hover {
        transform: none;
      }
      .tg-aud {
        padding-left: max(1rem, env(safe-area-inset-left, 0px));
        padding-right: max(1rem, env(safe-area-inset-right, 0px));
        -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
      }
      .tg-aud h2#tg-aud-title {
        font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 6.5vw, 2.1rem);
      }
      /* Full-bleed horizontal chip row: one pill per audience, swipe to see all */
      .tg-aud-tabs-wrap {
        justify-content: flex-start;
        width: 100vw;
        max-width: 100vw;
        margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
        margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
        padding-left: max(1rem, env(safe-area-inset-left, 0px));
        padding-right: max(1rem, env(safe-area-inset-right, 0px));
        box-sizing: border-box;
        overflow: visible;
        min-width: 0;
      }
      @supports (width: 100dvw) {
        .tg-aud-tabs-wrap {
          width: 100dvw;
          max-width: 100dvw;
          margin-left: calc(50% - 50dvw);
          margin-right: calc(50% - 50dvw);
        }
      }
      .tg-aud-tabs {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: nowrap;
        justify-content: flex-start;
        align-items: stretch;
        gap: 0.5rem;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: none;
        padding: 0.35rem 0.35rem 0.65rem 0;
        margin: 0;
        overflow-x: auto;
        overflow-y: hidden;
        -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
        scroll-behavior: smooth;
        overscroll-behavior-x: contain;
        background: transparent;
        box-shadow: none;
        outline: none;
        border-radius: 0;
        scrollbar-width: none;
      }
      .tg-aud-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar {
        display: none;
      }
      .tg-aud-tabs button {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        min-height: 44px;
        padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem;
        font-size: clamp(0.84rem, 3.4vw, 0.92rem);
        letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        white-space: nowrap;
        background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
        box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.07);
        outline: 1px solid rgba(220, 193, 181, 0.45);
      }
      .tg-aud-tabs button:not([aria-selected="true"]):hover {
        background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 1);
        color: var(--aud-orange);
      }
      .tg-aud-tabs button[aria-selected="true"] {
        outline-color: transparent;
        box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.28);
      }
      /* Block-level flex + horizontal margins center the pill on narrow viewports */
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta {
        display: flex !important;
        width: fit-content;
        max-width: min(100%, 42rem);
        margin-left: auto;
        margin-right: auto;
        min-height: 48px;
        justify-content: flex-start !important;
        padding: 0.4rem 3.35rem 0.4rem 0.65rem;
        font-size: clamp(0.8rem, 3.2vw, 0.9rem);
      }
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:hover,
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:focus-visible {
        padding: 0.4rem 0.65rem 0.4rem 3.35rem;
      }
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta .tg-aud-cta-knob {
        width: 2.35rem;
        height: 2.35rem;
        min-width: 2.35rem;
        max-width: 2.35rem;
        min-height: 2.35rem;
        max-height: 2.35rem;
        right: 0.2rem;
      }
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:hover .tg-aud-cta-knob,
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:focus-visible .tg-aud-cta-knob {
        right: calc(100% - 2.55rem);
      }
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta .tg-aud-cta-knob::before {
        width: 16px;
        height: 16px;
      }
    }
    @media (max-width: 380px) {
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta {
        padding: 0.4rem 3.2rem 0.4rem 0.5rem;
      }
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:hover,
      #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:focus-visible {
        padding: 0.4rem 0.5rem 0.4rem 3.2rem;
      }
    }
    .tg-aud-panels {
      position: relative;
    }
    .tg-aud-panel[hidden] {
      display: none !important;
    }
    @keyframes tg-aud-panel-in {
      from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(10px);
      }
      to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
      }
    }
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) {
      .tg-aud-panel:not([hidden]) {
        animation: tg-aud-panel-in 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) both;
      }
    }
    .tg-aud-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
      align-items: center;
    }
    @media (min-width: 1024px) {
      .tg-aud-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
        gap: 3.5rem;
      }
    }
    .tg-aud-copy h3 {
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 800;
      font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.25rem);
      line-height: 1.2;
      margin: 0 0 1rem;
      color: var(--aud-on);
    }
    .tg-aud-copy > p.tg-aud-lede {
      margin: 0 0 1.75rem;
      font-size: 1.05rem;
      line-height: 1.7;
      color: var(--aud-muted);
    }
    .tg-aud-list {
      list-style: none;
      margin: 0 0 1.75rem;
      padding: 0;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 1.1rem;
    }
    .tg-aud-list li {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 0.85rem;
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      line-height: 1.35;
      color: var(--aud-on);
    }
    .tg-aud-list .material-symbols-outlined {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      font-size: 1.35rem;
      color: var(--aud-orange);
      background: rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.1);
      border-radius: 999px;
      padding: 0.25rem;
    }
    /* Same pill as hero “Order Now” / Why Choose CTA: white disc + flying arrow */
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta,
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:link,
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:visited {
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: flex-start;
      width: fit-content;
      max-width: min(100%, 42rem);
      min-height: 44px;
      height: auto;
      padding: 6px 48px 6px 22px;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: #f06b1a !important;
      background-color: #f06b1a !important;
      color: #ffffff !important;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: #ffffff;
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
      line-height: 1.25;
      text-decoration: none !important;
      border: none;
      box-shadow: none !important;
      cursor: pointer;
      box-sizing: border-box;
      transition: padding 0.5s ease, background-color 0.22s ease;
      -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
      outline: none;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:hover,
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:focus-visible {
      padding: 6px 22px 6px 48px;
      color: #ffffff !important;
      -webkit-text-fill-color: #ffffff;
      background-color: #e85f0f !important;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:focus-visible {
      outline: 2px solid rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.65);
      outline-offset: 3px;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta .tg-aud-cta-label {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      padding: 0;
      margin: 0;
      color: inherit;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta .tg-aud-cta-knob {
      position: absolute;
      top: 50%;
      right: 4px;
      left: auto;
      width: 32px;
      height: 32px;
      min-width: 32px;
      max-width: 32px;
      min-height: 32px;
      max-height: 32px;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      border-radius: 999px;
      background: #ffffff;
      transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(0deg);
      transition: right 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease;
      z-index: 1;
      overflow: hidden;
      pointer-events: none;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:hover .tg-aud-cta-knob,
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta:focus-visible .tg-aud-cta-knob {
      right: calc(100% - 36px);
      transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg);
    }
    #tg-perfect-for a.tg-aud-cta .tg-aud-cta-knob::before {
      content: "";
      display: block;
      width: 15px;
      height: 15px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      background: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A//www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%2024%2024%22%20fill%3D%22none%22%20stroke%3D%22%23231a15%22%20stroke-width%3D%222.25%22%20stroke-linecap%3D%22round%22%20stroke-linejoin%3D%22round%22%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M7%2017L17%207%22/%3E%3Cpath%20d%3D%22M7%207h10v10%22/%3E%3C/svg%3E")
        center / contain no-repeat;
    }
    .tg-aud-visual {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 0;
      max-width: 560px;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }
    @media (min-width: 1024px) {
      .tg-aud-visual {
        margin: 0;
        max-width: none;
      }
    }
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual {
      transition: transform 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
    }
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-photo-inner,
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-quote,
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-float-badge {
      transition: transform 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 0.45s ease;
    }
    @media (min-width: 768px) {
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
      }
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover .tg-aud-photo-inner {
        box-shadow: 0 34px 68px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.11);
      }
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover .tg-aud-float-badge {
        transform: rotate(5deg) translate3d(0, -4px, 0.02px);
        box-shadow: 0 20px 44px color-mix(in srgb, var(--tg-brand-green) 38%, transparent);
      }
    }
    @media (min-width: 768px) {
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover .tg-aud-quote {
        transform: translateY(-4px);
        box-shadow: 0 28px 56px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.13);
      }
    }
    @media (min-width: 640px) and (max-width: 767px) {
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover .tg-aud-quote {
        transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-4px);
        box-shadow: 0 28px 56px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.13);
      }
    }
    @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual,
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-photo-inner,
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-quote,
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-float-badge {
        transition: none !important;
      }
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover {
        transform: none !important;
      }
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover .tg-aud-photo-inner {
        box-shadow: var(--aud-shadow) !important;
      }
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover .tg-aud-quote {
        box-shadow: 0 24px 50px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.12) !important;
      }
      #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover .tg-aud-float-badge {
        transform: rotate(6deg) translate3d(0, 0, 0.02px) !important;
        box-shadow: 0 16px 36px color-mix(in srgb, var(--tg-brand-green) 32%, transparent) !important;
      }
      @media (max-width: 767px) {
        #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover .tg-aud-quote {
          transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
        }
      }
      @media (min-width: 768px) {
        #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-visual:hover .tg-aud-quote {
          transform: none !important;
        }
      }
      .tg-aud-panel:not([hidden]) {
        animation: none !important;
      }
    }
    /* Photo wrapper: no z-index — avoids WebKit/Elementor painting the image layer over the badge */
    .tg-aud-photo {
      position: relative;
      overflow: visible;
    }
    .tg-aud-photo-inner {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 0;
      isolation: isolate;
      border-radius: 2.5rem;
      overflow: hidden;
      aspect-ratio: 4 / 3;
      box-shadow: var(--aud-shadow);
    }
    .tg-aud-photo-inner img {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      display: block;
    }
    .tg-aud-photo-inner::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      z-index: 1;
      background: linear-gradient(to top right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38), transparent 55%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .tg-aud-quote {
      position: absolute;
      z-index: 3;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      bottom: -1.75rem;
      width: calc(100% - 2rem);
      max-width: 22rem;
      background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
      backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
      -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
      border-radius: 1.5rem;
      padding: 1.25rem 1.35rem;
      box-shadow: 0 24px 50px rgba(35, 26, 21, 0.12);
      outline: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
    }
    @media (min-width: 768px) {
      .tg-aud-quote {
        left: -0.5rem;
        transform: none;
        bottom: -2rem;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: 22rem;
      }
    }
    .tg-aud-quote-top {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.85rem;
      margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    }
    .tg-aud-avatar {
      width: 3.25rem;
      height: 3.25rem;
      border-radius: 999px;
      overflow: hidden;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      outline: 2px solid rgba(240, 107, 26, 0.2);
      background: #f1dfd7;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 800;
      font-size: 0.85rem;
      color: var(--aud-orange);
    }
    .tg-aud-avatar img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
    }
    .tg-aud-quote-name {
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 800;
      font-size: 0.95rem;
      line-height: 1.2;
      margin: 0;
    }
    .tg-aud-quote-role {
      margin: 0.25rem 0 0;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--aud-orange);
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
    }
    .tg-aud-quote-text {
      margin: 0 0 0.65rem;
      font-size: 0.92rem;
      line-height: 1.55;
      color: var(--aud-muted);
      font-style: italic;
    }
    .tg-aud-stars {
      display: flex;
      gap: 0.15rem;
      color: var(--aud-orange);
    }
    .tg-aud-stars .material-symbols-outlined {
      font-size: 1rem;
      font-variation-settings: "FILL" 1, "wght" 500, "GRAD" 0, "opsz" 24;
      background: none;
      padding: 0;
    }
    /* After .tg-aud-photo, before .tg-aud-quote; z-index above quote + photo */
    .tg-aud-float-badge {
      position: absolute;
      z-index: 30 !important;
      top: -0.75rem;
      right: -0.5rem;
      display: none;
      background: var(--aud-green-pill);
      color: var(--aud-green-pill-ink);
      padding: 0.65rem 1rem;
      border-radius: 1rem;
      box-shadow: 0 16px 36px color-mix(in srgb, var(--tg-brand-green) 35%, transparent);
      outline: 3px solid #fff;
      transform: rotate(6deg) translate3d(0, 0, 0.02px);
      font-family: "Geist", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 800;
      font-size: 0.68rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 0.35rem;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    @media (min-width: 768px) {
      .tg-aud-float-badge {
        display: flex;
      }
    }
    .tg-aud-float-badge .material-symbols-outlined {
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      color: var(--aud-green-pill-ink);
      background: none;
      padding: 0;
    }
    /* Force paint order: some themes set img { z-index: 1 } which bleeds stacking */
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-photo {
      z-index: auto !important;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-photo-inner {
      z-index: 0 !important;
      position: relative !important;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-photo-inner img {
      z-index: 0 !important;
      position: relative !important;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-photo-inner::after {
      z-index: 1 !important;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-quote {
      z-index: 3 !important;
    }
    #tg-perfect-for .tg-aud-float-badge {
      z-index: 50 !important;
      position: absolute !important;
      mix-blend-mode: normal !important;
    }
  </style>

  <script>
    (function () {
      var root = document.getElementById("tg-perfect-for");
      if (!root) return;
      var tabs = root.querySelectorAll('.tg-aud-tabs [role="tab"]');
      var panels = root.querySelectorAll(".tg-aud-panel");
      var order = ["students", "professionals", "families", "seniors"];
      var cur = 0;
      var autoTimer = null;
      var ROTATE_MS = 8000;
      var hoverInside = false;
      var motionOk = !window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches;

      function activate(key, opts) {
        opts = opts || {};
        var i = order.indexOf(key);
        if (i >= 0) cur = i;
        tabs.forEach(function (t) {
          var on = t.getAttribute("data-audience") === key;
          t.setAttribute("aria-selected", on ? "true" : "false");
          t.tabIndex = on ? 0 : -1;
        });
        panels.forEach(function (p) {
          var id = p.id || "";
          var match =
            (key === "students" && id === "tg-panel-students") ||
            (key === "professionals" && id === "tg-panel-professionals") ||
            (key === "families" && id === "tg-panel-families") ||
            (key === "seniors" && id === "tg-panel-seniors");
          if (match) {
            p.removeAttribute("hidden");
          } else {
            p.setAttribute("hidden", "");
          }
        });
        if (opts.scrollTab && window.matchMedia("(max-width: 767px)").matches) {
          var activeTab = root.querySelector('.tg-aud-tabs [data-audience="' + key + '"]');
          if (activeTab) {
            activeTab.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", inline: "center", block: "nearest" });
          }
        }
      }

      function stopAuto() {
        if (autoTimer) {
          clearInterval(autoTimer);
          autoTimer = null;
        }
      }

      function tick() {
        if (!motionOk || document.hidden || hoverInside || root.contains(document.activeElement)) return;
        cur = (cur + 1) % order.length;
        activate(order[cur], { scrollTab: false });
      }

      function startAuto() {
        stopAuto();
        if (!motionOk || document.hidden) return;
        autoTimer = setInterval(tick, ROTATE_MS);
      }

      function restartAutoAfterUser() {
        stopAuto();
        startAuto();
      }

      root.addEventListener("mouseenter", function () {
        hoverInside = true;
      });
      root.addEventListener("mouseleave", function () {
        hoverInside = false;
      });
      document.addEventListener("visibilitychange", function () {
        if (document.hidden) stopAuto();
        else startAuto();
      });

      tabs.forEach(function (tab) {
        tab.addEventListener("click", function () {
          activate(tab.getAttribute("data-audience"), { scrollTab: true });
          restartAutoAfterUser();
        });
        tab.addEventListener("keydown", function (e) {
          var i = order.indexOf(tab.getAttribute("data-audience"));
          if (e.key === "ArrowRight" || e.key === "ArrowDown") {
            e.preventDefault();
            var n = (i + 1) % order.length;
            activate(order[n], { scrollTab: true });
            restartAutoAfterUser();
            root.querySelector('[data-audience="' + order[n] + '"]').focus();
          } else if (e.key === "ArrowLeft" || e.key === "ArrowUp") {
            e.preventDefault();
            var p = (i - 1 + order.length) % order.length;
            activate(order[p], { scrollTab: true });
            restartAutoAfterUser();
            root.querySelector('[data-audience="' + order[p] + '"]').focus();
          } else if (e.key === "Home") {
            e.preventDefault();
            activate(order[0], { scrollTab: true });
            restartAutoAfterUser();
            root.querySelector('[data-audience="' + order[0] + '"]').focus();
          } else if (e.key === "End") {
            e.preventDefault();
            activate(order[order.length - 1], { scrollTab: true });
            restartAutoAfterUser();
            root.querySelector('[data-audience="' + order[order.length - 1] + '"]').focus();
          }
        });
      });

      activate("students", { scrollTab: false });
      startAuto();
    })();
  </script>
</section>
